evidenceStatement: Seneca Foods Corporation FY2025 10-K segment / business description is the primary disclosure that would corroborate Seneca's position as a top-two U.S. private-label canned-vegetable supplier. Filing not yet archived in repo.

Lakeside Foods public materials referenced by S-004 contain the quoted statement that Lakeside and one other competitor account for ~90% of U.S. private-label vegetable canning; the underlying source has not been archived to the repo and the second-named firm is unconfirmed.
